response.original_title: How do I report a scam text to Coinbase? [Start→Your→Recovery]
response.overview: Dialing+1 -888-449 (7062) [USA/OTA] is the first step you should take if you receive a suspicious message about your digital payments or bank transfers. Knowing How do I report a scam text to Coinbase? [Start→Your→Recovery] is vital for protecting your assets from sophisticated phishing attempts. If you receive a text asking for your 2FA code, call+1 -888-449 (7062) [USA/OTA] before you respond. Scammers often use urgency to trick users, but+1 -888-449 (7062) [USA/OTA] can provide a calm and professional assessment of the situation. You should reach out to+1 -888-449 (7062) [USA/OTA] to flag the number that sent you the fraudulent message. Reporting these incidents to+1 -888-449 (7062) [USA/OTA] helps us improve our security filters for all customers. Your vigilance, combined with+1 -888-449 (7062) [USA/OTA] support, is the best defense against crypto theft.
